missingOpen.title: feat(ios): add background alive beacon support
fix: narrow plugin CLI missing-command diagnostic
build: block legacy plugin sdk imports in xai
Scope workspace guidance to coding contexts
fix: preserve external routing for group/topic webchat sessions
[Feature]: Add MLX Talk provider MVP for local macOS TTS
fix: use guard-safe temp prefix in QA multipass runtime
Plugins: keep untrusted workspace channel shadows out of setup-time loads
[Bug]: Agent self-update bypasses update.run and uses raw npm global upgrade without restarting gateway
feat(discord): add canvas-first Discord Activities support
refactor: move incomplete-turn recovery behind provider hooks
fix(qa-lab): remove token from bootstrap response and bind Docker ports to loopback [AI]
fix(systemd): reconcile managed-env unit migrations
QA: fix mock-openai qa-channel regressions
style: apply oxfmt formatting to 16 files
feat(plugins): narrow gateway route loads from manifests
fix(qa): honor stale cursor fallback in long polls
PR flow: defer changelog to merge and harden prepare/merge edges
feat: add per-agent web_fetch ssrf overrides
Docs: clarify testing CI policy
fix(whatsapp): finish timeout-aware setup and status handling
fix(whatsapp): add QR login result codes and preflight hook
fix(whatsapp): reuse active QR and preserve runtime warnings
Remove legacy dedupe file migration code from inbound-dedupe.ts
CI: harden release-check script execution paths
fix(memory-core): silence expected operator.admin scope miss in dreaming cleanup
test(auth): add oauth e2e regression coverage
feat(workspace): add safe workspace reset command
[Security] zizmor template-injection findings across CI workflows
add option for MCP apps support
Umbrella: duplicate transcript, replay, and context assembly across channels
Architecture: remove duplicate BlueBubbles schema in core (boundary violation)
channels: remove core duplicate channel schemas in zod-schema.providers-core.ts (post-#69193)
fix(synology-chat): add SSRF guard to sendFileUrl [AI-assisted]
[RFC] ACP everywhere: consolidate all LLM/agent launches behind a single ACP runtime seam
WhatsApp: align multi-account `groups` inheritance with Telegram's isMultiAccount guard (breaking)
fix: preserve nvidia-prefixed model refs in session overrides and config writes
feat(exec): add normalized auto mode
refactor(agents): share hook history windows
control ui: replace assistant-media ?token auth with scoped media tickets
docs(codex): document native compaction hooks
docs(codex): document native model lifecycle hooks
refactor(whatsapp): centralize account policy
CI: respond to secret scanning alerts
fix(skills): refresh persisted snapshots after restart
`cron run` manual trigger doesn't faithfully reproduce the scheduled execution environment
Show generated image links in ACP
fix(codex): isolate app-server OAuth homes
feat(migrations): add Hermes import path
[Feature]: Standard Interface for External Security and Guardrail Checks
fix(agents): load symlinked workspace bootstrap files
[Bug]: 4.29 still crashes plugin-runtime-deps with `Invalid Version: ''` on Node v22 / npm v10 (different code path from #74949)
fix(memory): distinguish sqlite-vec vs embedding provider in vector warning
fix(agents): hide media provider inventory by default
